pkgmetadata.longdescription: Provides libraries for processing large data sets on AWS with Pandas. Developed by the team at [deductive.com](httpsdeductive.com) as we find them useful in our projects. copy Deductive 2012-2020, all rights reserved. This code is licensed under MIT license. See [license.txt](httpsbitbucket.orgdeductivenewtoolssrcmasterlicence.txt) for details. For documentation see [read the docs](httpnewtools.readthedocs.io)
